question.question: I suspect the reviewers {a1} the sample size unless we justify it more explicitly.

source.name: Custom: Will vs Be Going To All Levels (C1)

tag.name: Will vs Be Going To All Levels

variants.text: I suspect the reviewers {a1} the sample size unless we justify it more explicitly.

hints.hint:
Form: **will + base verb**.
We use **will** for an opinion, assumption, or neutral prediction without direct evidence.
Example: *I suspect the reviewers will question the sample size unless we justify it more explicitly.*

Forma: **will + czasownik w formie podstawowej**.
Używamy **will** do wyrażenia opinii, przypuszczenia lub neutralnej prognozy bez bezpośrednich dowodów.
Przykład: *I suspect the reviewers will question the sample size unless we justify it more explicitly.*

Форма: **will + V1**.
Вживаємо **will** для думки, припущення або нейтрального передбачення без прямого видимого доказу.
Приклад: *I suspect the reviewers will question the sample size unless we justify it more explicitly.*

chatgpt_explanations.question: I suspect the reviewers {a1} the sample size unless we justify it more explicitly.
chatgpt_explanations.explanation:
❌ "are going to" does not fit because this is an opinion or prediction without direct evidence. Here we use **will**.
Example: *I suspect the reviewers will question the sample size unless we justify it more explicitly.*
